\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Class \mbox{\hyperlink{classPolylineDiscretisationData}{Polyline\+Discretisation\+Data}}. 

This classes contains all informations about the well discretisation on 3D unstructured mesh.

This is created along importing Open\+Flow\textquotesingle{}s Polyline\+Discretization class.
